role_summary: Git pre-push hook that enforces local test execution before allowing code to be pushed to the remote repository.
extracted_finding: Implements a mandatory testing gate within the version control workflow. The script conditionally runs backend tests using pytest via uv and frontend tests using pnpm, depending on directory existence. A non-zero exit code from either test suite aborts the push operation, enforcing a local continuous integration practice that ensures only verified code is shared, thereby maintaining code quality and preventing regressions from entering the remote repository.
